why_no_new_modules: Per scheduled task instructions: 'AP Biology — DO NOT ADD MORE until existing are audited.' Slot A completed the retroactive audit. Slot B's job was to act on those audits — which meant either narration patches (for non-broadcast modules) or documenting broadcast constraints (for already-uploaded modules). Adding new AP CSA / AP Psychology modules in the same run would have either (a) skipped the full 3-reviewer cascade (forbidden) or (b) exceeded the time budget. Chose 1 verified patch over multiple unverified generations.
